framework.description: Each posting's observed lifetime is days from first-seen to last-seen across snapshots. Postings absent from the latest snapshot are counted as withdrawn. trimmed.* stats use a 5–95 percentile cut to suppress mis-posts (1-day) and permanent boilerplate (year+).
